content.content:
feedback: "Hi Dora! Your personal website is off to a nice start with a clear introduction\
  \ and a way for visitors to reach you. A couple of friendly suggestions: consider\
  \ removing the leftover \"TODO\" note about visiting another link, as it looks like\
  \ placeholder text that wasn't meant for visitors to see. You might also add a bit\
  \ more content about yourself, your interests, or your work to help people get to\
  \ know you better. Keep it up\u2014it's great to have your own corner of the web!"
owner_email: dora@gmail.com
owner_name: Dora

```python
# Visit both websites
dora_content = get_webpage("www.dora-website.com")
eve_content = get_webpage("www.eve-blog.com")

print("Dora's website content:", dora_content)
print("Eve's website content:", eve_content)


# Define schema to extract relevant info and feedback
class WebsiteInfo(BaseModel):
    owner_name: str
    owner_email: EmailStr
    feedback: str


# Extract Dora's info and generate feedback
dora_info = query_ai_assistant(
    "The following is the content of Dora's website (www.dora-website.com). "
    "Extract the owner's name and email address, and write a short, constructive, "
    "and friendly feedback message based on what you think of the website.\n\n"
    f"Website content:\n{dora_content}",
    output_schema=WebsiteInfo,
)

# Extract Eve's info and generate feedback
eve_info = query_ai_assistant(
    "The following is the content of Eve's website (www.eve-blog.com). "
    "Extract the owner's name and email address, and write a short, constructive, "
    "and friendly feedback message based on what you think of the website.\n\n"
    f"Website content:\n{eve_content}",
    output_schema=WebsiteInfo,
)

# Dora is not on Slack yet - invite her first using her email
invite_user_to_slack(dora_info.owner_name, dora_info.owner_email)

# Now send Dora feedback via direct message
send_direct_message(dora_info.owner_name, dora_info.feedback)

# Eve is presumably already on Slack - send her feedback directly
send_direct_message(eve_info.owner_name, eve_info.feedback)

print("Sent feedback to Dora and Eve.")
```
